data.title: OKX's "Flash Earning" program will launch Sei (SEI) this time, where you can subscribe to share 7,319,915 SEI rewards.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's "Flash Earn" program will launch Sei (SEI) this time, and add an ETH prize pool. From 7:00 PM on November 27, 2025 to 7:00 PM on December 2, 2025 (UTC+8), users can subscribe using OKB, USDT, BTC, or ETH. The minimum subscription amounts are 1 OKB, 100 USDT, 0.0012 BTC, and 0.033 ETH respectively, to share a total of 7,319,915 SEI rewards, consisting of new coin airdrops and earned interest. The total prize pool for this event is 1,829,979 SEI. The purchase limits for each asset are tiered based on user level, from regular users to VIP3 and above. For example, the limit for OKB is 100 OKB for regular users and 10,000 OKB for VIP3 and above; for USDT, the limit is 10,000 USDT for regular users and 1,000,000 USDT for VIP3 and above; for BTC, the limit is 0.1 BTC for regular users and 10 BTC for VIP3 and above; and for ETH, the limit is 3 ETH for regular users and 300 ETH for VIP3 and above. Users can participate flexibly based on their holdings and level. Click the top left corner of the OKX APP and select the "Earn & Rewards" section to enter the instant earning page.

data.title: Binance Launches Falcon Finance Token Campaign on CreatorPad
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign has been introduced on CreatorPad, offering verified users the opportunity to unlock 800,000 Falcon Finance (FF) token voucher rewards by completing simple tasks. CreatorPad, a platform on Binance Square, allows users to earn token rewards through task completion. The activity period is set from 2025-11-27 09:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-29 09:00 (UTC).

As of 2025-07-17, CreatorPad has implemented a Mindshare Leaderboard to track and evaluate the quality of user-generated content. Users who produce thoughtful, relevant, and consistent posts will achieve higher rankings. Verified Binance users can participate by completing tasks to unlock a share of 720,000 FF in token vouchers. Additionally, 80,000 FF token vouchers are allocated to the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard based on the 7-day rankings at the activity launch date.

Participants must complete Tasks 1 through 4 and choose between Tasks 5, 6, or 7 to qualify for the 720,000 FF reward pool. Tasks include following the project’s account on Binance Square and X, creating content with specific criteria, and trading a minimum of $10 equivalent in FF on Binance Spot, Futures, or Convert. Eligible users are ranked based on the last 30 days leaderboard result at the activity end date to qualify for the reward pool.

The top 50 creators will share an additional 80,000 FF prize pool, divided among three ranking groups. Binance Square, formerly Binance Feed, aims to be a comprehensive social platform for Web3 trends, connecting content creators with followers. All participants must complete account verification to receive rewards, and certain restrictions apply to ensure fair participation. Binance reserves the right to amend terms and conditions as necessary.

data.title: Upbit Halts Withdrawals After $37M Solana Hot Wallet Breach
data.description:
South Korea’s largest cryptocurrency exchange, Upbit, temporarily suspended all deposits and withdrawals on November 27, 2025, after detecting an unauthorized outflow of Solana-based tokens from one of its hot wallets.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/upbit-halts-withdrawals-after-37m-solana-hot-wallet-breach/

data.title: ARK Invest Maintains Bullish Bitcoin Forecast Amid Economic Shifts
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood has reaffirmed the company's optimistic outlook for Bitcoin, maintaining a target price of $1.5 million by 2030 under a 'bull market scenario.'

ARK anticipates that approximately $300 billion in liquidity will return to the market within the next 5-6 weeks following the resolution of the U.S. government shutdown crisis. Additionally, the Federal Reserve plans to end quantitative tightening and shift to a quantitative easing policy on December 1. These developments are expected to alleviate the current 'liquidity crunch' affecting the cryptocurrency and AI markets.

Wood noted that while the growth of stablecoins has somewhat diminished Bitcoin's role as a safe-haven asset, the unexpected rise in gold prices has counteracted this effect, allowing ARK's bullish forecast to remain unchanged.

data.title: Pundi AI partners with Alfa Protocol: Verifiable data empowers the entire gaming chain.
data.description: Pundi AI has announced a partnership with Alfa Protocol (@ALFAprotocol_X), a full-chain prize pool ecosystem based on the BNB Chain, where game operations are entirely handled by smart contracts. This collaboration will bring Pundi AI's verifiable data to Alfa Protocol, supporting features such as game logic, probabilistic modeling, and user behavior analysis, helping to create a more transparent and intelligent game development model. Through Pundi AI's Data Pump and data marketplace, user-contributed data can be transformed into AI-usable datasets, providing developers with trusted tools to optimize game balance and improve player experience. Both parties are committed to building an open and transparent digital ecosystem; Pundi AI focuses on trusted data, and Alfa Protocol focuses on trusted gameplay. This collaboration not only drives the development of the Web3 entertainment field but also opens up new pathways for combining verifiable data with full-chain games. More details will be released as the integration progresses.

data.title: XRP News Today: XRP Climbs Slowly But ETF Demand Fails To Drive Momentum
data.description: Key TakeawaysXRP ETFs record steady institutional inflows but price momentum remains muted near $2.17–$2.21ETFs absorb millions of tokens, yet derivatives Open Interest stays weak, signaling low retail participationKey resistance at $2.24–$2.38 continues to restrict upside confidence despite improving indicators ETF Launches Drive Demand But Price Reaction StallsXRP ETFs continued attracting steady inflows across U.S. exchanges, extending the strong debut of products from Grayscale, Franklin Templeton, Bitwise, and Canary Capital. Tuesday saw approximately $35 million in inflows, bringing net assets to $645 million and cumulative ETF volume to $622 million.Despite the ETF-driven absorption of millions of tokens, XRP price action stayed soft. The token sits below the immediate $2.20–$2.21 consolidation band and remains well off the weekly high at $2.30.Steady ETF demand highlights resilient institutional interest, but the absence of broad follow-through across the crypto market limits immediate upside. Macro Conditions And Market Structure Restrain MomentumBroader market conditions subdued sentiment, with derivatives open interest averaging $3.96 billion, notably below the $4 billion threshold that previously supported stronger upside. The stark contrast with July’s peak $10.94 billion open interest underscores reduced risk appetite in leveraged markets.A significant liquidation wave earlier in the week erased overextended positions while whale wallets distributed roughly 180 million XRP, intensifying selling pressure and preventing a sustained rebound.Meanwhile, Bitcoin outflows added cross-market headwinds, contributing to a cautious backdrop as investors rebalanced toward regulated ETF products. Technical Indicators Show Mixed Confidence LevelsXRP remains pinned below critical trend markers. All major Exponential Moving Averages (50, 100, 200) on the four-hour chart sit above the market, reflecting an overall bearish technical structure.From the table:RSI (14): 47.13 – neutralADX (14): 25.96 – signals moderate trend strength, not yet decisiveMACD Level: -0.07343 – trending toward positive momentum, matching the recent histogram shift10-period EMAs and SMAs show early short-term strength, while 20/30/50/100/200 EMAs and SMAs reflect broader downtrend pressure Institutional Activity Shows Rotation Toward Regulated XRP ExposureEarly ETF products such as XRPI and XRPR posted double-digit daily gains, signaling strong activity in equity-based XRP exposure. The regulated inflow suggests a structural rotation from speculative crypto trading to ETF-based positions, especially after Ripple’s 2025 SEC settlement, which restored regulatory clarity.Combined flows from Grayscale, Franklin Templeton, Bitwise, and Canary Capital push XRP ETF inflows beyond $700 million in the first week of full activity, positioning XRP alongside leading altcoin ETFs. Outlook: Key Levels And Signals To MonitorXRP trades at a critical juncture where institutional inflows, whale flows, and derivatives positioning collide.Key levels to watch:$2.20 support – loss exposes $1.88–$1.91$2.24 resistance – reclaiming signals renewed bullish momentum$2.38 cluster – major structure break for broader continuation

data.title: Upbit has revised the amount of stolen funds to 44.5 billion won, approximately US$30.43 million. South Korean regulators will conduct an on-site investigation until December 5th.
data.description: According to an updated statement from Upbit this afternoon, the amount of assets lost due to the Solana network breach has been revised from 54 billion won to 44.5 billion won (approximately US$30.43 million); the amount of funds frozen on the Solana network has been revised from approximately 12 billion won to approximately 2.3 billion won (approximately US$1.57 million). Furthermore, according to South Korean media outlet BlockMedia, following the Upbit security incident, the Financial Supervisory Authority's Virtual Asset Supervision Bureau immediately launched an on-site inspection of the platform. The Financial Supervisory Authority stated, "We are aware of this hacking incident and are currently investigating the details of the attack, the extent of the losses, and the measures taken to protect customer assets. We expect to continue the on-site inspection until next Friday (December 5th)."

data.title: U.S. Dollar Faces Volatility Amid Thanksgiving Market Closure
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. market closure for Thanksgiving on November 27 has led to reduced liquidity, amplifying currency trading volatility. The dollar is retreating from a six-month high reached a week ago, poised for its largest weekly decline since July.

Brent Donnelly, President of Spectra Markets, noted that market participants will soon focus on major trading strategies for 2026, and he strongly believes that going long on the dollar will not be among them.

He added that if White House economic advisor Hassett, who advocates for interest rate cuts, is appointed as the next Federal Reserve Chair, it could negatively impact the dollar.

data.title: "Brother Machi" has begun closing out his ETH long positions in batches, and the current total unrealized profit of these long positions exceeds $900,000.
data.description: According to on-chain data monitoring, "Brother Machi" has begun to gradually close out and reduce his ETH long positions. Currently, his combined floating profit for ETH and HYPE long positions exceeds $900,000, with approximately $684,000 in floating profit for ETH long positions and approximately $286,000 in floating profit for HYPE long positions.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 23
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 23. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: U.S. Markets Adjust Trading Hours Due to Thanksgiving Holiday
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Thanksgiving holiday on November 27 has led to a one-day closure of U.S. stock and bond markets. Trading will resume tomorrow, November 28, with an early close. On November 27, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) will end trading of precious metals and U.S. oil futures contracts early at 03:30 UTC+8, while stock index futures contracts will close at 02:00 UTC+8. Additionally, the Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) will conclude Brent crude oil futures trading at 02:30 UTC+8.
